market_note: South Fulton market — Roosevelt Hwy / 30291 corridor
brand_angle: South Fulton's flexible event hall, elevated — a premium venue brand that finally matches the room.
tagline: South Fulton's celebration venue — a flexible banquet hall built for weddings, sweet 16s, and the moments that matter.

services.title: Full-Hall Event Rental
services.desc: Spacious, adaptable banquet space for weddings, birthdays, sweet 16s, corporate functions, seminars, and pop-up shops — flexible layouts for groups of all sizes with ample parking.

services.title: Luxury Seating & Throne Chairs
services.desc: On-site and off-site rentals of clear chiavari chairs and gold/silver-trimmed throne chairs to elevate any celebration, with delivery available.

services.title: Photo Booth & Event Enhancements
services.desc: Mobile photo booth that instantly texts and emails guest photos, plus add-on decor and enhancement packages to complete the experience.

reviews.quote: I can't say enough GREAT things about this space and the staff. I called in tears because another event space canceled my daughter's sweet 16 party 4 days before the event. Ms. Sandy was patient and eager to assist. This is my second time using this event space and they NEVER disappoint.
reviews.author: Caprice Clarke

reviews.quote: My mom just had her 60th birthday party a couple days ago — everything was amazing and beautiful, and boy was we lit.
reviews.author: Sherrell Sabb

reviews.quote: This place is amazing. We had my daughter's sweet 16 party and she loved everything. The decor was to the T.
reviews.author: Regina Rosser

self_exec.pitch: Premium venue brand + a modern booking-ready site + AI automation that answers inquiries 24/7, qualifies events, holds dates, and follows up automatically so no booking slips through the cracks.
deliverables: Bespoke venue brand identity (gold SFEH crest) matching the quality of the room
Fast modern one-page site with date-inquiry capture
AI intake + booking assistant (24/7 inquiry response, event qualification, calendar holds)
Automated follow-up sequences for tours and deposits
